message:
🐛 Suppress AgentSetupDialog auto-show on Netlify; update button text (#3069)

- AgentSetupDialog no longer auto-pops on console.kubestellar.io where
  no agent can be installed (can still be opened manually via event)
- Netlify saved mission button: "Install KubeStellar Console to Run
  This Mission" — clearer intent, opens install dialog on click

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ import { safeGetItem, safeSetItem } from '../../lib/utils/localStorage'
 import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'
 import { UI_FEEDBACK_TIMEOUT_MS } from '../../lib/constants/network'
 import { copyToClipboard } from '../../lib/clipboard'
+import { isNetlifyDeployment } from '../../lib/demoMode'
 
 const DISMISSED_KEY = 'kc-agent-setup-dismissed'
 const SNOOZED_KEY = 'kc-agent-setup-snoozed'
@@ -40,6 +41,9 @@ export function AgentSetupDialog() {
   }, [])
 
   useEffect(() => {
+    // Never auto-show on Netlify — no agent can be installed there
+    if (isNetlifyDeployment) return
+
     // Only show after initial connection check completes
     if (status === 'connecting') return

@@ -686,11 +686,8 @@ export function MissionChat({ mission, isFullScreen = false, fontSize = 'base' a className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors" > - Install KubeStellar Console + Install KubeStellar Console to Run This Mission -

- Run this mission against your own clusters -

) : isDemoMode ? (
